ShortDescription.Value: Exports readable local JSON snapshots of your Cities: Skylines II city for dashboards, scripts, and analysis tools.

Publish.LongDescription:
CS2 Data Export writes periodic JSON snapshots of your current city to the local ModsData folder.
The export includes city basics, population, education, workforce, workplaces, mobility, transit line records, economy signals, external connection signals, housing and labor pressure context, and export metadata.
It is designed for local analysis workflows: dashboards, scripts, spreadsheets, and AI-assisted city review. The mod does not upload data or change city simulation behavior.
Default output: %USERPROFILE%\AppData\LocalLow\Colossal Order\Cities Skylines II\ModsData\CS2DataExport
